entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop on which the effects of IPM components were studied

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The pest insect targeted by IPM components

entities.name: NEEM
entities.description: A biological control agent used as an oviposition deterrent and antifeedant

entities.name: OVIPOSITION DETERRENT
entities.description: The ability to discourage insects from laying eggs

entities.name: ANTIFEEDANT EFFECT
entities.description: The ability to discourage insects from feeding

entities.name: MORTALITY
entities.description: The rate of death in the larval stage of the pest

entities.name: LARVAL DURATION
entities.description: The length of time the pest remains in the larval stage

entities.name: PUPAL DURATION
entities.description: The length of time the pest remains in the pupal stage

entities.name: PUPAL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the pest in the pupal stage

entities.name: OVIPOSITION PERIOD
entities.description: The effective period during which eggs are laid

entities.name: FECUNDITY
entities.description: The reproductive rate of the pest

entities.name: ROBIN BLUE
entities.description: A 1% solution used as an ultraviolet ray protectant

entities.name: HANPV
entities.description: A nucleopolyhedrovirus used to control Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: IPM
entities.description: Integrated Pest Management components used to control pests
